mapper.select: select a.insp_req_dt, a.insp_req_no, a.insp_gb, a.prodid, a.linecd, a.progcd, a.ordymd, a.proymd, a.lotno, a.itemcd, b.itemnm, a.prdqty from pd_insp_req a left outer join HSBA010T_TBL b on a.cmpycd = b.cmpycd and a.itemcd = b.itemcd where a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and a.insp_req_dt between #{insp_req_dt_f} and #{insp_req_dt_t} and a.insp_gb = #{insp_gb} and a.linecd = #{linecd} order by a.insp_req_dt, a.insp_req_no

select a.insp_req_dt, a.insp_req_no, a.prodid, a.linecd, a.progcd, a.ordymd, a.proymd, a.lotno, a.itemcd, c.insp_ord, c.inspcd, b.CDNM as insp_nm, c.sample_cnt, c.errqty from pd_insp_req a left outer join pd_insp_rslt_m c on a.cmpycd = c.cmpycd and a.prodid = c.prodid and a.insp_gb = c.insp_gb and a.insp_req_dt = c.insp_req_dt and a.insp_req_no = c.insp_req_no left outer join HPBA900T_TBL b on c.cmpycd = b.cmpycd and c.inspcd = b.CODE and b.CDGBN = '830' where a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and a.insp_req_dt = #{insp_req_dt} and a.insp_req_no = #{insp_req_no} and a.insp_gb = #{insp_gb} and a.linecd = #{linecd} order by c.insp_ord
